title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned that Claude is increasingly involved in code writing, review, experiments, and AI development tasks that contribute to recursive self-improvement. Both Anthropic and OpenAI are raising concerns about the pace of AI advancement, with Claude handling more of the work in developing next-generation AI systems while humans retain goal-setting authority.
